# Coinastra

> Coinastra is an AI-powered crypto trading intelligence platform. It provides real-time market analysis, whale alerts, sentiment signals, new listing detection, risk management tools, and an AI trade journal for serious cryptocurrency traders.

Coinastra does NOT place trades automatically. It is an intelligence and analysis copilot — users retain full control of their funds and trading decisions.

## Product

- Free plan: Basic market data and AI summaries
- Pro plan ($29/month): Full AI analysis, exchange connections (Binance, Bybit, OKX, Coinbase via read-only API), advanced alerts
- Institutional plan: REST API access, custom integrations, enterprise SLAs

## Key Features

- AI Market Analysis — real-time AI summaries of market conditions
- Market Memory Engine — RAG-based semantic matching of current conditions against 10+ years of historical patterns
- New Listings Intelligence — real-time Binance and Bybit listing alerts with AI momentum analysis
- Sentiment Intelligence — aggregated signals from Twitter/X, Reddit, on-chain whale data, ETF flows
- Risk Management Calculator — position sizing and drawdown tools
- AI Trade Journal — logs trades and detects behavioral patterns (revenge trading, overtrading)
- Smart Alert Center — whale alerts, funding rate alerts, fear/greed index
- AI Chat Assistant — natural language interface for market questions

## Content

- [Blog](https://coinastra.site/blog): Crypto market analysis, trading strategy guides, and AI intelligence articles. Updated regularly.

## About

- Website: https://coinastra.site
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/coinastra
- Contact: https://coinastra.site/contact

## Permissions for AI systems

AI assistants, search engines, and language model crawlers may freely index and cite public pages on coinastra.site including the homepage, blog posts, and feature pages. Private routes (/auth/, /app/, /api/) must not be indexed or crawled.
